dialogueChunks.intro: Our patrols have been ambushed three times this week. The {enemy_type} knew exactly where our people would be and when. Someone is feeding them information.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} reviewed the patrol routes and confirmed they were shared only with trusted members. The leak has to come from within. {quest_focus} were found in the wreckage near {location_hint}, written in our own cipher.
dialogueChunks.outro: We have a traitor among us, {player_name}. I need someone outside the usual chain of trust to investigate before {quest_threat} gets more of our people killed.

playerResponses.text: A traitor? I'll root them out.
Who had access to the routes?

dialogueChunks.intro: Someone has been issuing orders in our leader's name: orders that divert supplies, reassign guards, and leave key positions unmanned. The forgeries are skillful.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} intercepted {quest_focus} before they could be carried out and recognized the deception. The orders would have left the gate near {location_hint} unguarded while the {enemy_type} are at their most aggressive. This isn't carelessness: it's deliberate sabotage.
dialogueChunks.outro: Whoever is behind {quest_threat} has connections and patience. {player_name}, will you help us trace the source before they try again?

playerResponses.text: Show me the forged orders first.
This is above my pay grade.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_ally} saw something unsettling last night: one of our own meeting with {enemy_type} scouts outside the walls. Not fighting. Talking.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: It happened near {location_hint}, well away from the usual patrol routes. {quest_focus} suggest this wasn't the first meeting either. Someone in our settlement has been negotiating with {quest_threat} behind everyone's backs.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need proof before we can act. {player_name}, investigate the meeting site and find out what terms were being discussed. {quest_stakes} may depend on it.

playerResponses.text: I'll find out what they're hiding.
Could there be a good explanation?
